series_metadata.series_description: File contains all delinquent agent claim files and license suspension/revocation hearing information, including: correspondence, original evidentiary materials, transcripts, legal opinions, and final orders for the Ohio Lottery Sales Agents (Retailers), Ohio Lottery Sales Agents (Retailers) Applicants, Video Lottery Sales Agents and their employees.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: digital copy in system two (2) years statute of limitations further appeals has expired; review administrative value
